title: Solo Leveling Awakened
description: Solo Leveling Awakened is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to experience the world of Solo Leveling!
body:
![Solo Leveling Awakened SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kW2CPZvp/images/fd5dfa98af6b5ed57869f1665a69b4d7caca559c.png)
# Overview
**Solo Leveling Awakened** is a Sci-fi themed Modpack based on the anime/manhwa "Solo Leveling". Awaken player, place your hand on the evaluator and find out your rank and class! Train, complete daily quests, stock potions and more, enter gates and fight your way to the top encounter all the different bosses and creatures from Solo Leveling inside. Grow in strength and join the strongest guild!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/solo-leveling-awakened)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/solo-leveling-awakened)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Solo Leveling** - Bosses, weapons, gates and more! Fight and gain more power as you struggle in these Mana filled worlds.
- [✔️] **World Generation** - A world teeming with structures all the fights you could possibly want, power up and get stronger.
- [✔️] **Epic Fight** - Enjoy a range of custom animations with each weapon from solo leveling, fully integrated with epic fight and the custom 3d models each weapon has.

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
